name: Growth Golf
about: Growth Golf is an indoor golf studio operating in Broomfield and Littleton, Colorado. They feature TrackMan IO simulator bays equipped with Virtual Golf 3 software, offering access to over 400 world-famous courses in a climate-controlled environment. The venue provides a variety of services including private lessons, club fittings, and bay rentals, catering to golfers of all skill levels with a focus on data-driven improvement and community engagement.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading TrackMan IO technology provides precise ball and club data
24/7 member access to bays with priority booking and personalized coaching plans
Virtual Golf 3 offers 400+ renowned courses in stunning 4K realism

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service is available.
No information on alcohol service is available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading, PGA-trusted bays built to refine every part of your game.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the venue does not explicitly mention club rentals, it specializes in professional club fittings, suggesting golfers would use their own clubs. However, it's best to contact them directly to confirm availability of loaner clubs or rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on bringing outside food or drinks, nor does it indicate an on-site kitchen or bar. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification on their policy regarding outside consumables.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time required to play 18 holes. However, the time would depend on the simulator software and the number of players in your group. You can contact them for more details on typical play times.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Growth Golf advertises 'lesson packs for all ages' and has a specific section for 'Junior Golf,' indicating a welcoming environment for younger golfers.
